title: 10ml Buddha Wood Essential Oil - Freshskin Beauty LTD | 100% Pure & Natural Essential Oils
features: Supplied in 10ml, 50ml & 100ml amber glass bottles with dropper and tamper evident cap.
MSDS & Allergens cert available on request.
description: Product Description Essential Oil Description Discover our huge range of 100% pure essential oils, perfect for use at home or in homemade gifts and beauty products. At Freshskin, we source only the finest natural ingredients directly from producers around the world. This helps to keep the cost of our essential oils low whilst giving us the control we need to ensure that all of our products are free from synthetics. We’re passionate about supplying the very best quality essential oils and aromatherapy oils in the UK, and hope you enjoy browsing our hand-picked collection. Product Information 100% Pure Essential Oils Supplied in 10ml, 50ml & 100ml amber glass bottles with dropper and tamper evident cap. MSDS & Allergens certificates available on request. UK Manufactured 100% Pure & Natural Essential Oils At Freshskin, we source only the finest natural ingredients directly from producers around the world. This helps to keep the cost of our essential oils low whilst giving us the control we need to ensure that all of our products are free from synthetics. Aromatherapy Trade Council The Aromatherapy Trade Council (ATC) is a trade association for the specialist aromatherapy essential oil trade, and represents manufacturers and suppliers of the aromatherapy products as well as the interests of consumers in the United Kingdom. Not Tested On Animals We now stock over 300 essential oils, fragrance oils and carrier oils and we are proud to say that no freshskin products are tested on animals. Bottled In The UK Since 2010, Fresh Skin Beauty have been supplying premium natural health and beauty products to individuals, hobbyists and wholesale customers who seek the best products. We are extremely proud to say that all freshskin products are bottled right here in the United Kingdom. Essential Oils ATC Not Tested On Animals Bottled In The UK Since 2010, Fresh Skin Beauty have been supplying premium natural health and beauty products to individuals, hobbyists and wholesale customers who seek the best essential oils. From day one, our philosophy has centered around quality products and a great service. Over the years we’ve worked tirelessly to establish relationships with producers of the finest ingredients from all four corners of the planet. Our unique business model of dealing directly with the growers and producers of our herbs, plants, vitamins and essential oils means we use the finest ingredients direct from the source. We harness the magical power of plants to create luxurious beauty products that not only enhance the appearance of your skin, but also improve your mental state as well. Our gentle skincare range is so natural and pure that it’s suitable for everyone, regardless of age or skin type. We now stock over 300 essential oils, fragrance oils and carrier oils, as well as beautiful hand-made soaps, moisturisers and body lotions. Head over to our online store now and start your Fresh Skin journey. Thanks for dropping by. The Fresh Skin Beauty team.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: May cause skin irritation. Avoid contact with eyes and mouth. Keep out of reach of children. Do not ingest. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and flames. Always dilute with a carrier oil before use.
